# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: static-website-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: static-website-assets-{{ env["deployment"] }}
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: index.html
      notFoundPage: 404.html
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    logging:
      logBucket: static-website-assets-{{ env["deployment"] }}-logs
      logObjectPrefix: access-logs/
    cors:
      - origin:
          - "*"
        method:
          - GET
          - HEAD
        responseHeader:
          - Content-Type
          - Cache-Control
        maxAgeSeconds: 3600
    labels:
      purpose: static-website
      managed-by: deployment-manager

- name: static-website-logs-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: static-website-assets-{{ env["deployment"] }}-logs
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    lifecycle:
      rule:
        - action:
            type: Delete
          condition:
            age: 90
    labels:
      purpose: access-logs
      managed-by: deployment-manager

- name: static-website-bucket-iam
  type: gcp-types/storage-v1:virtual.buckets.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    bucket: static-website-assets-{{ env["deployment"] }}
    role: roles/storage.objectViewer
    member: allUsers
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
      - static-website-bucket

outputs:
  - name: bucketName
    value: static-website-assets-{{ env["deployment"] }}
  - name: bucketUrl
    value: https://storage.googleapis.com/static-website-assets-{{ env["deployment"] }}
  - name: websiteUrl
    value: https://storage.googleapis.com/static-website-assets-{{ env["deployment"] }}/index.html
  - name: logsBucketName
    value: static-website-assets-{{ env["deployment"] }}-logs
